hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf\s+/|git\s+push\s+.*--force|git\s+push\s+.*-f\s|git\s+reset\s+--hard|drop\s+database|DROP\s+TABLE"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected. Please confirm before executing: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi'
hooks.description: Block dangerous commands (rm -rf /, force push, hard reset, drop database)

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "Pipeline session complete. Review changes before pushing."'
